if you want to understand him here is a list of what some of his speak is like

Alien Elliot — Speaking Examples

Friendly / Curious

  • “Bleep-zobloink?”
    (Are you okay?)

  • “Zrrr-bip!”
    (Ooh! What’s that?)

  • “Blorp-blorp!”
    (I like this!)

Excited

  • “ZOBLOINK!!”
    (This is amazing!!)

  • “Bwee-deee-ZRRR!!”
    (Look look look!!)

  • “Bleeeep-hooo!!”
    (Yay!!)

Confused

  • “Zrr-whip?”
    (Huh?)

  • “Blop...?”
    (Explain?)

  • “Beeep-zob?”
    (Is that right?)

Happy / Affectionate

  • “Brrrp-zobloink~”
    (I like being here.)

  • “Ziii-bwee...”
    (You’re nice.)

  • “Bleep-bloop-humaaaan!”
    (Friend!!)

Worried / Sad

  • “...zobloink?”
    (Did I do something wrong?)

  • “Brrr-zrp...”
    (Uh-oh.)

  • “Beeeee...”
    (I don’t like this.)
creator: ODD
